step_rationale: Arachidonic acid enzyme generating pro-inflammatory and pro-thrombotic lipid mediators.
mechanism: Lipoxygenase catalyzes arachidonic acid oxidation to pro-inflammatory and pro-thrombotic lipid mediators in plaque inflammation.

references.title: Restoring perturbed oxylipins with Danqi Tongmai Tablet attenuates acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology

references.title: Pharmacogenomics: a tool to prevent and cure coronary heart disease.

trials.title: Role of the Arachidonate 5-Lipoxygenase Pathway in Coronary Heart Disease
A Phase 2 Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study of the Effect of VIA-2291, a 5-Lipoxygenase Inhibitor, on Vascular Inflammation in Patients After an Acute Coronary Syndrome Event
